description: Shows the Highest Common Factor (HCF/GCD) using prime factor bars. Requires two or more primefactor variable references. Standalone expression with at() positioning. Leaf nodes are highlighted with an orange stroke for emphasis.
utility: Visualize HCF using prime factor bars

arguments.name: factors
arguments.description: Two or more primefactor variable references

examples.expression:
P1 = primefactor(at(4,4), 12)
P2 = primefactor(at(4,10), 18)
H = hcfbar(at(10,4), P1, P2)

P1 = primefactor(at(4,4), 24)
P2 = primefactor(at(4,10), 36)
P3 = primefactor(at(4,16), 48)
H = hcfbar(at(10,4), P1, P2, P3)
